Event: Magic Well - November 2025
Event Date: 06/11/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: B43


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Ranger Chest
Emerald Guardian Bow

When attacking, has a [20%-22%] chance of dealing [75%-90%) damage to a group of enemies.
The attacks of the bow's wielder have a 65% chance to additionally deal 256000 pure damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it, and increase the cooldown of all abilities of the affected enemy units by 1,5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
